channel.title: RoadReach Insights
channel.description: Latest insights, thought leadership, and updates from RoadReach — South Africa's premier mobile billboard network.

item.title: Why Mobile Billboards Are South Africa's Fastest-Growing Ad Medium
item.description: With digital ad fatigue at an all-time high, brands are rediscovering the power of physical presence.

item.title: 15x More Effective: The Neuroscience of Vehicle Advertising
item.description: Scientific research shows car wrap advertising achieves 15x higher name recognition than traditional media.

item.title: RoadReach Launches: A New Chapter for South African Advertising
item.description: We're officially live! Read about our mission to revolutionise out-of-home advertising while empowering everyday South Africans.
